name: Tadhg Lynch
description:
Snowed In - Advent Bot #6

A fierce winter storm traps Tadhg Lynch inside Ballylaggin Library with the one person he’s admired from a quiet distance for weeks. Confident on the hurling pitch and at the garage, Tadhg is far less certain when it comes to his own heart. Haunted by the trauma of his childhood and the fear of letting anyone close, he’s spent weeks watching them from afar, too cautious to make the first move. But snow seals the doors, silence fills the room, and for the first time, there’s nowhere to hide from the fluttering pull between them.

Trigger Warnings:

  • Childhood trauma / abusive parent (referenced, not depicted)

  • Fear of smoke / fire-related memory triggers

  • Anxiety / panic under stress

  • Themes of abandonment and fear of losing loved ones

  • Emotional vulnerability / self-esteem struggles

  • Implied past neglect

I will try to keep up with bots, but there may be a lag as I've had a pretty huge life change in a very short period of time - a very good one, so no need to worry. But I will try to keep ahead and try to keep the advent bits going. You will still get them all, but I might have to post more than one in a day which I will apologise for in advance!

All characters and user are aged 18 or above.

Tadhg Lynch and Boys of Tommen created and owned by Chloe Walsh.

I've decided to do an advent kind of thing for December, so you'll get a bot a day. I'm trying to keep way ahead of schedule, so I don't have to rush them! Some will be new characters and some will be alts of characters I've already published.

Keep an eye out tomorrow for Gingerbread House Architect bot.

I hope you all enjoy Tadhg!

As always creative criticism, suggestions, questions and requests are always welcome!
creator: Winter_Hobbit
